verdict.evidence: The source says 'The Ministry of Defence is sending a proposal' (present continuous, ongoing/imminent action), while the output says 'has submitted a proposal' (present perfect, completed action). This is a subtle tense drift from an in-progress action to a completed one. All other temporal elements (the 2 April 2026 date, future tense for proposed changes, current law descriptions) are accurately represented.
